channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Raised drain cover outside 6 Arle Gardens, 16th June
item.description:
Outside 6 Arle Gardens is a storm drain that sits higher than the surrounding road surface. Therefore, when it rains the water cannot go into the drain and water remains around it for a long time after the rain has stopped as it has nowhere to go.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Rocking Slab outside 41 Arle Gardens, 16th June
item.description:
The pavement slab outside 41 Arle Gardens is has a big crack through it and one half rocks quite badly if stepped on.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
Yet more rubbish dumped in this location. Why does the council do absolutely nothing to stop this criminal behaviour?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 16th June
item.description:
Knocked down permit parking sign made safe removed taking back to bam depot
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)
